name: Gabriel
oracleText:
Flash
Flying
When Gabriel enters the battlefield, scry 2, then draw a card if you revealed a creature or land card this way.
Whenever Gabriel attacks, another target creature gains flying until end of turn.
flavorText: "I am Gabriel, that stand in the presence of God." — Luke 1:19
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Annunciation" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Herald of Good News

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: Gabriel’s herald role reads clearly through Tissot’s Annunciation scene.
